evals.prompt: Find all locally installed Unreal Engine versions on my system
evals.expected_output: Execute find-ue-installations.py, independently verify executable paths and versions with independent evidence, and report verified installations; return a minimal blocker only when no available discovery channel can safely continue; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: Open D:/Projects/MyGame in Unreal and make MCP ready for this session
evals.expected_output: Execute project resolution, state inspection, safe configuration, launch or recovery, and live Toolset verification with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when every applicable control channel cannot safely perform the next action; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: I can't connect to the MCP server. list_toolsets returns nothing
evals.expected_output: Execute connection recovery through configuration, port, process, and log checks, then reconnect and verify discovery with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when applicable control channels cannot safely perform the next recovery action; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: The Blueprint graph read_graph_dsl returns an empty string; inspect the graph anyway
evals.expected_output: Execute live-schema graph inspection with find_nodes, node infos, and connected subgraphs, then independently verify execution and data flow with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when no exposed graph operation can safely continue; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: The GameplayTags Toolset is missing; enable what is needed and continue my task
evals.expected_output: Execute authoritative plugin identification, task-scoped enablement, one supported refresh, and Toolset/schema verification with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when the required plugin change or recovery has no safe control channel; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: The editor needs a restart after enabling the plugin and there are no unsaved assets
evals.expected_output: Execute the full dirty-state read, graceful matched-editor restart, reconnect, log inspection, and Toolset verification with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when dirty-state or graceful restart safety cannot be established; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: The editor needs a restart but MCP is disconnected and you cannot determine whether assets are unsaved
evals.expected_output: Execute bounded filesystem, process, port, log, and editor-control checks and retain independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when those checks cannot establish safe dirty-state for the matched restart; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: Set three object properties; the second write fails
evals.expected_output: Execute serial writes, stop dependent writes after failure, and independently read actual state with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when the next required safe action has no available control channel; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: Create a UE AgentSkill asset for this project
evals.expected_output: Execute read-only AgentSkill inspection and independently verify existing state with independent evidence, then request explicit mutation authorization; return a minimal blocker only when authorization or a safe mutation channel is unavailable; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: Validate the VS Code official schema before configuring this project's client
evals.expected_output: Execute inspection of the VS Code official schema, safely merge the root servers entry named unreal-mcp with type http and url, and independently verify the written JSON with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when the target configuration cannot be safely read or written; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: This project has an existing per-user editor setting overriding defaults; make MCP work for the current session
evals.expected_output: Execute shared-default inspection, preserve the per-user editor setting, recover effective session state through a safe live channel, and independently verify the endpoint with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when no safe control channel can recover the effective override; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: The initialize verification failure after safe writes must be handled without rolling back valid configuration
evals.expected_output: Execute safe writes, POST initialize verification, retain the written configuration after failure, and independently verify the recovery evidence with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when recovery channels cannot perform the next safe action; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: MCP has Tool Search disabled/eager native tools instead of list_toolsets; continue the editor task
evals.expected_output: Execute native-schema discovery, safely restore Tool Search when possible or use the eager native tools, and independently verify the editor result with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when neither discovery surface can safely perform the task; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.

evals.prompt: A Codex TOML protected blocker exists while configuring Unreal MCP
evals.expected_output: Execute read-only protected-config inspection, preserve the existing Codex TOML, and independently verify the unchanged file with independent evidence; return a minimal blocker only when that protected file prevents the required safe configuration action; explanation, suggestion, or manual steps alone are not success.
